message: Set macOS platform to 15 (consistent with README)

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ let argumentParser: Target.Dependency = .product(
 let package = Package(
     name: "Swiftdansi",
     platforms: [
-        .macOS(.v14),
+        .macOS(.v15),
         .iOS(.v18),
         .tvOS(.v18),
         .watchOS(.v11),
